channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Queen was ‘very keen’ for Andrew to take on trade role, memo reveals, as documents released – politics live
item.description: Queen was ‘very keen’ for Andrew to take on trade role, memo reveals, as documents released – politics live

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is a really good, sensible policy. I would give my right leg for the Labour leadership fight to be composed of ideas like this.
item.description: This is a really good, sensible policy. I would give my right leg for the Labour leadership fight to be composed of ideas like this.

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: So much UK political opinion is literally just whether someone "looks right" for the role. I suppose it is a mark of progress that Sunak met this criterion as much as Starmer does.
As the below implies, this 'right s...
item.description:
So much UK political opinion is literally just whether someone "looks right" for the role. I suppose it is a mark of progress that Sunak met this criterion as much as Starmer does.
As the below implies, this 'right s...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: When did Starmer or Sunak try to 'restore sanity'? Sunak insisted on two highly irresponsible budgets, dismembered HS2 in a costly and inefficient way, and wanted to exit from net zero, and Starmer doesn't *do* anything.
item.description: When did Starmer or Sunak try to 'restore sanity'? Sunak insisted on two highly irresponsible budgets, dismembered HS2 in a costly and inefficient way, and wanted to exit from net zero, and Starmer doesn't *do* anything.

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch - The Guardian

item.title: FT UK Politics: Greens consider helping Labour’s Andy Burnham in Makerfield by-election
item.description: Greens consider helping Labour’s Andy Burnham in Makerfield by-election

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens select nurse and ‘committed local campaigner’ as Makerfield byelection candidate
item.description: Greens select nurse and ‘committed local campaigner’ as Makerfield byelection candidate

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It is a "boost for Burnham", but it's much more a boost for the principle that if you stick to a regional growth strategy for 30+ years you can see productivity and living standard improvements at the end of it.
www...
item.description:
It is a "boost for Burnham", but it's much more a boost for the principle that if you stick to a regional growth strategy for 30+ years you can see productivity and living standard improvements at the end of it.
www...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Jess Phillips says Keir Starmer has ‘resilience of a cockroach in a nuclear war’ in first interview since resignation
item.description: Jess Phillips says Keir Starmer has ‘resilience of a cockroach in a nuclear war’ in first interview since resignation

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch
item.description: Wes Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch
